data.name: Design REST API schema for User module
data.description: Design the initial REST endpoints and request/response shapes for User authentication and profiles.

data.name: Setup PostgreSQL database
data.description: Spin up RDS postgres instance and run init scripts.

data.name: Implement User Login Endpoint
data.description: Create POST /api/login

data.name: Implement User Register Endpoint
data.description: Create POST /api/register

data.name: Fix password reset bug
data.description: Password reset link throws 500 when clicked twice.

data.name: Create Dashboard UI Wireframes
data.description: Design the main analytics dashboard wireframes in Figma

data.name: Develop Dashboard Frontend Component
data.description: React component for the main view

data.name: Setup CI/CD pipeline in GitHub Actions
data.description: Create github actions workflows for lint, test, and build

data.name: Write unit tests for Auth service
data.description: Reach 80% coverage on auth module

data.name: Refactor database connection pool
data.description: Current connection pool is leaking connections

data.name: Update API Documentation
data.description: Update Swagger docs with new user endpoints.
